mapper.insert: INSERT INTO position (code, name, description, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM position WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, code, name, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM position ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE position SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM position WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
